series_metadata.series_description: Construction plans and specifications for public and semi-public entities.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain one year in operating area, destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed use- ful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm is checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
